data.title: 52-Week Topline Results from 16-Week Blinded Treatment Extension of REZOLVE-AA Demonstrate Deepening of Responses in Severe-to-Very-Severe Alopecia Areata with Rezpegaldesleukin
data.description: Around 29% of patients in the 18 µg/kg extension arm and about 31% in the 24 µg/kg extension arm attained a new SALT Score ≤20 from week 36 to week 52 while undergoing treatment twice monthly. The number of patients reaching significant hair growth levels according to the SALT criteria progressively increased during this period.

data.title: Volition Launches rNuQ™ Webshop Broadening Product Range
data.description: HENDERSON, Nevada - In a recent announcement on April 20, 2026, VolitionRx Limited unveiled the introduction of its rNuQ webshop, providing a selection of dependable recombinant nucleosomes. These nucleosomes, developed by the multi-national epigenetics company over a decade, are now available for purchase. Volition, listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol VNRX, aims to make these research tools easily accessible to customers for various applications.

data.title: Nexera: KeepZone AI Enters into White Label Agreement to Develop its AI-Based Voice Communication Decision Support System
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel – April 20, 2026 - Nexera Technologies Ltd, previously Jeffs’ Brands Ltd, has disclosed its plans to venture into the global homeland security sector using advanced AI technology. The company, trading as NEXR and NEXRW on Nasdaq, stated that its subsidiary, KeepZone AI Inc., has recently formed a strategic white label partnership with a third-party tech provider. This collaboration aims to enhance KeepZone’s AI-driven voice communication decision support system.

data.title: TJ Biopharma Enters into Agreement with Biogen for Felzartamab Assets in the Greater China Region
data.description: Biogen has acquired exclusive global development and commercialization rights to felzartamab through a recent deal. The antibody, which targets CD38, has the potential for wide use in various immune-mediated conditions. This transaction consolidates the ownership rights under Biogen, signaling the company's commitment to advancing this therapy across the globe.

data.title: Hackers linked to North Korea’s Lazarus Group almost drained $292M from LayerZero through a forged cross-chain message.
data.description: Cyber attackers successfully carried out a breach by forging a cross-chain message. They nearly executed a second theft within minutes and made sure to cover their tracks as they left the system.

data.title: DEFSEC Announces Board Changes, Strengthening Strategic Leadership
data.description: Former General Manager of General Dynamics Mission Systems International, David Ibbetson, has recently joined the board of DEFSEC Technologies Inc. This move comes as Paul Mangano has retired from the board. The announcement was made on April 20, 2026. DEFSEC Technologies Inc. is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under tickers DFSC and DFSC.WT.U, as well as on NASDAQ under tickers DFSC and DFSCW.

data.title: First Trust Launches an ETF for a New Era in the Industry
data.description: On April 20, 2026, FT Portfolios Canada Co. revealed the launch of units for the First Trust Nasdaq® Clean Edge® Smart Grid Infrastructure ETF (SGRD) on the Toronto Stock Exchange. The Fund marks its debut in trading today, with the ticker symbol SGRD assigned to its units.
Share buyback program transactions have been initiated with a substantial number of shares.

data.title: BWXT Bolsters American Nuclear Manufacturing Capability With Strategic Acquisition
data.description: A recent announcement stated that BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) has finalized a deal to purchase Precision Components Group, LLC (PCG), which consists of its divisions Precision Custom Components (PCC) and DC Fabricators (DCF). PCG, a privately owned American company, specializes in crafting intricate, thick-walled, and heat-transfer components. This acquisition will broaden BWXT’s heavy-manufacturing presence and introduce further capacity for commercial nuclear production within the United States.

data.title: Cronos Group Inc. to Hold 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call on May 11, 2026
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Cronos Group Inc. announced that it would conduct its 2026 first quarter earnings conference call on May 11, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The discussion, led by Cronos’ senior management team, will cover the company’s financial performance. There will also be a Q&A session with the investment community following the prepared remarks. Cronos Group Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CRON and on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CRON.

data.title: Bitcoin Holds $75,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Start Week Flat On Geopolitical Uncertainty
data.description: Bitcoin is trading at approximately $75,000, with Bitcoin ETFs experiencing $663.9 million in net inflows on Friday. Ethereum ETFs also reported $127.5 million in net inflows. The current prices for cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) $75,128, Ethereum (ETH) $2,306, Solana (SOL) $85.00, XRP $1.42, Dogecoin (DOGE) $0.09468, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) $0.0056008. The meme coin market capitalization remains relatively stable with a slight 0.5% decrease. For more details, refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bavarian Nordic – Transactions in Connection with Share Buy-Back Program
data.description: Denmark-based Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) has revealed updates on its share buy-back program initiated on March 12, 2026. The company plans to repurchase its shares totaling up to DKK 200 million between March 12 and May 13, 2026. This initiative complies with Regulation (EU) No. 596/2014 (as amended) and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052, known as the Safe Harbour Regulation in the European Parliament and Council on market abuse.

data.title: $1.4B poured into crypto funds last week; assets under management jump to $154.8B as Bitcoin climbs to near $78,000.
data.description: Last week, cryptocurrency investment products saw an inflow of $1.4 billion as Bitcoin surged to nearly $78,000. This resulted in assets under management reaching $154.8 billion.
